name: L-2 fetcher honors --freshness-window and reports fresh_skip when the last fetch was inside the window per L-19 daily-fresh gate
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T09:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb-consumerfinance.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --freshness-window 24h --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'fresh_skip' err.txt && grep -q 'window=24h' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
